response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced and technically proficient Staff/Senior Software Engineer with deep expertise in distributed systems and event-driven architectures, his resume does not demonstrate the required executive-level leadership experience or the specific production-scale multi-agent AI architecture background crucial for a CTO in this domain. He also lacks explicit experience operating AI systems in regulated financial environments and scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people, which are hard requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience in backend and distributed systems engineering.
Proficiency with event-driven architectures and real-time processing.
Current involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: Limited explicit experience in senior technical leadership roles (CTO/VP level) scaling teams (10 to 30+).
Lack of demonstrated production experience architecting multi-agent AI systems at scale in high-stakes environments.
Insufficient evidence of deep fintech-specific AI integration and regulatory compliance experience.
